response.justification: The candidate brings 17 years of continuous, broad software engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial initiative, but falls substantially short of the principal/director-level AI strategy profile this role demands. AI and ML work appears only in the most recent ~14 months (MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq), with no prior ML modeling, AI product ownership at scale, or strategic advisory history. Cloud depth is limited to AWS CDK and basic container orchestration. The role requires advising strategic customers, shaping cloud-AI product direction organizationally, and inspiring cross-functional technical leadership; the resume demonstrates strong individual contribution and community teaching but no evidence of that advisory or executive-influence dimension.
strengths: 17+ years of continuous software engineering spanning web, high-performance distributed systems, mobile, and embedded — genuine technical breadth that supports cross-domain thinking
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates sustained open-source product ownership and entrepreneurial initiative in a non-trivial domain (geospatial, event-driven, Kubernetes-deployable platform)
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflows), providing a concrete, recent foothold in the emerging agent tooling space
concerns: AI expertise is narrow and very recent (<14 months) — scoped to developer tooling and MCP code generation, with no demonstrated ML modeling, AI platform ownership, or track record shaping AI product strategy at scale

No evidence of director-level IC work: no record of advising strategic customers or partners, influencing product roadmaps across business units, or operating at the executive-engagement level this role explicitly requires

Cloud experience is shallow and incidental — AWS CDK and Docker/Kubernetes appear as implementation details in individual-contributor roles, with no demonstrated cloud architecture depth, multi-region platform design, or cloud-native AI infrastructure at scale
